title: Pod Anti-Affinity for HA Spread
description:
Deploy a 3-replica Deployment with `requiredDuringScheduling` podAntiAffinity on `kubernetes.io/hostname` topology key. This ensures no two replicas ever land on the same node — a high-availability pattern that survives single-node failures.

**Common Pitfalls:** With `required` anti-affinity and more replicas than nodes, excess replicas stay Pending forever. For clusters with fewer nodes than replicas, switch to `preferred` anti-affinity. The `topologyKey` must be a real node label — `kubernetes.io/hostname` is always present; zone labels require cloud provider setup.
steps: Create a Deployment 'ha-app' with 3 replicas and app=ha-app label
Add requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution podAntiAffinity using labelSelector on app=ha-app
Set topologyKey to kubernetes.io/hostname to spread one pod per node
Apply and verify: kubectl get pods -o wide shows each pod on a different node
Scale to 4+ replicas if cluster has only 3 nodes — observe extra pod stays Pending
hints: podAntiAffinity is under spec.template.spec.affinity, not spec.affinity
labelSelector.matchLabels must match the pod's own labels to create self-anti-affinity
topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname means 'no two matched pods on the same hostname'
kubectl get pods -o wide shows the NODE column for each pod
Use 'ha-app' as the app label value in selector.matchLabels, template.metadata.labels, and the antiaffinity matchLabels — all three must match

editor_config.initial_code:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ha-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: # TODO: use 'ha-app'
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: # TODO: use 'ha-app'
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - labelSelector:
              matchLabels:
                app: # TODO: use 'ha-app'
            topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: nginx:alpine

_solution.code_solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ha-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ha-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ha-app
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - labelSelector:
              matchLabels:
                app: ha-app
            topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: nginx:alpine
_solution.validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo 'Checking Deployment ha-app exists...'
if ! kubectl get deployment ha-app &>/dev/null; then
  echo '✗ Deployment ha-app not found'
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ Deployment ha-app exists'

echo 'Checking replicas is 3...'
REPLICAS=$(kubectl get deployment ha-app -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}')
if [ "$REPLICAS" != "3" ]; then
  echo "✗ Expected 3 replicas, got $REPLICAS"
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ Deployment has 3 replicas'

echo 'Checking podAntiAffinity is configured...'
ANTI=$(kubectl get deployment ha-app -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.affinity.podAntiAffinity.requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution}')
if [ -z "$ANTI" ] || [ "$ANTI" = "null" ] || [ "$ANTI" = "[]" ]; then
  echo '✗ requiredDuringScheduling podAntiAffinity not set'
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ podAntiAffinity requiredDuringScheduling is configured'

echo 'Checking topologyKey is kubernetes.io/hostname...'
TOPO=$(kubectl get deployment ha-app -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.affinity.podAntiAffinity.requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution[0].topologyKey}')
if [ "$TOPO" != "kubernetes.io/hostname" ]; then
  echo "✗ topologyKey expected 'kubernetes.io/hostname', got '$TOPO'"
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ topologyKey is kubernetes.io/hostname'

echo 'Checking labelSelector matches app=ha-app...'
SEL=$(kubectl get deployment ha-app -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.affinity.podAntiAffinity.requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution[0].labelSelector.matchLabels.app}')
if [ "$SEL" != "ha-app" ]; then
  echo "✗ labelSelector.matchLabels.app expected 'ha-app', got '$SEL'"
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ labelSelector matches app=ha-app'

echo 'Waiting for available replicas...'
kubectl rollout status deployment/ha-app --timeout=120s || true

RUNNING=$(kubectl get pods -l app=ha-app --field-selector=status.phase=Running --no-headers 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
NODE_COUNT=$(kubectl get nodes --no-headers 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Running pods: $RUNNING / Node count: $NODE_COUNT"

if [ "$RUNNING" -gt 1 ]; then
  echo 'Checking all running pods are on different nodes...'
  NODES_USED=$(kubectl get pods -l app=ha-app -o jsonpath='{.items[*].spec.nodeName}' | tr ' ' '\n' | sort)
  UNIQUE_NODES=$(echo "$NODES_USED" | sort -u | wc -l)
  TOTAL_RUNNING_PODS=$(echo "$NODES_USED" | wc -l)
  if [ "$UNIQUE_NODES" -eq "$TOTAL_RUNNING_PODS" ]; then
    echo '✓ All running pods are on different nodes'
  else
    echo "✗ Multiple pods on the same node (unique nodes: $UNIQUE_NODES, running pods counted: $TOTAL_RUNNING_PODS)"
    exit 1
  fi
fi

echo ''
echo 'All checks passed!'
exit 0
